trip_completed_subtitle: Live tracking has ended for this trip.
pickup_otp_subtitle: Tell your driver this code after you board. We also text it to your phone.
pickup_otp_hint: Do not share it before you are in the vehicle.
waiting_driver_accept: Waiting for a driver to accept...
voice_no_audio: No audio captured. Please try again.
voice_process_error: Could not process recording. Please try again.
voice_stop_error: Could not stop recording cleanly. Please try again.
location_approximate_desc: Accuracy reported ~{{meters}}m. Check location services / browser permissions.
scheduled_ride_accepted_desc: A driver has accepted your scheduled ride.
microphone_error_desc: Allow microphone permission and try again.
destination_not_found_desc: Couldn't locate "{{place}}". Try a nearby landmark.
pickup_time_too_soon_desc: Choose a time at least 5 minutes from now.
ride_scheduled_desc: Pickup {{time}}. Nearby drivers are notified — check Prebookings when someone accepts.
booking_generic_error: Could not create ride request. Please try again.
ride_cancelled_desc: Your ride request has been cancelled successfully.
cancellation_failed_desc: Could not cancel the ride. Please try again.
service_unavailable_india: Services are only available within India.
invalid_time_desc: Please choose a pickup time at least 5 minutes from now.
safety_tip_verify_driver: Always verify the driver's photo and vehicle number before getting in.
safety_tip_share_trip: Share your trip with family members for added safety.
safety_tip_trusted: Use trusted driver mode for verified, background-checked drivers.
no_scheduled_rides_area: No upcoming scheduled rides in your area.
no_prebooked_rides_area: There are no upcoming prebooked rides in your area right now.
no_accepted_future: You haven't accepted any future rides yet.
trip_shared_desc: Trip details sent to your emergency contacts
trip_cancel_success_desc: Your trip has been successfully cancelled.
prebooking_confirmed_sub: Pickup is scheduled for {{time}}. Live tracking starts closer to your time.
emergency_location_toast_desc: Your emergency contacts have been notified with your live location.
emergency_need_help_body: If you're in immediate danger, call emergency services right away.
emergency_share_location_sub: Send your location to emergency contacts
no_trips_subtitle: Book a ride to see it here.
auth_signin_passenger: Sign in to continue as passenger
auth_register_passenger: Sign up to start booking rides
password_rule_min6: Password must be at least 6 characters
toggle_no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
toggle_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
safety_failed_fallback: Safety check unavailable right now. Your ride is still safe to book.
safer_route_switched_desc: We updated the map and fare for this route.
gender_required_desc: We use this to match drivers based on your safety preference.
prefer_gender_note_passenger: We'll match you with this driver gender first. You can expand search later if none are available.
prefer_gender_note_driver: Only passengers matching this preference will see your availability.
expand_search_desc: No matching driver online right now. Expand search to any nearby driver?
sos_confirm_desc: This will dial 112 and message your {{count}} emergency contact(s) with your live location.
sos_confirm_no_contacts: This will dial 112. Add emergency contacts in Safety Center so they get notified next time.
sos_fired_desc: Opening WhatsApp for {{count}} contact(s) and dialing 112.
sos_fired_no_contacts: Dialing 112. Add emergency contacts to alert them too.
share_pick_contact_desc: Tap a saved contact for a one-tap send, or pick from WhatsApp.
share_pick_anyone_desc: Send to anyone in your chat list
share_wa_intro: I'm sharing my live trip with you.
share_no_ride_desc: You can share live location once a ride starts.
share_expired_desc: The shared trip link has expired. Ask your friend to send a fresh link if their trip is still ongoing.
add_emergency_contact_desc: They will be alerted on WhatsApp when you tap SOS.
emergency_contact_added_desc: They will be alerted on SOS.
emergency_contact_invalid: Enter a name and Indian mobile number
emergency_contact_max: You can save up to 5 contacts.
emergency_contacts_empty: Save up to 5 contacts. They will receive your live trip link when you tap SOS.
emergency_share_location_sub_live: Send a live tracking link via WhatsApp
geolocation_unavailable: Location is not available on this device
geolocation_unavailable_desc: Pick your pickup manually using the map.
location_permission_denied_desc: Enable location in your browser settings to auto-fill pickup.
location_timeout_desc: Pick your pickup manually using the map.
safety_center_profile_hint: Add emergency contacts, call 112, and share your live trip or location.
add_stop_desc: Pick a location and we will ask your driver to accept.
max_stops_reached_desc: You can add up to 5 stops at booking.
request_stop_desc: We will let your driver know about the new stop.
stop_added_desc: Your driver accepted the new stop.
driver_stop_request_title: Passenger wants to add a stop
driver_stop_request_desc: Accept to update your route and fare.
confirm_force_visit: You are not within 80m of this stop. Mark visited anyway?
